programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young mom is killed and dumped near a bike path in California, and law enforcement eyes her estranged husband. With no solid proof, however, the case goes cold until a shocking witness comes forward after 13 years to reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A beloved Detroit trans woman living her truth is found shot to death one December morning. Many suspect a hate crime, and after two witnesses come forward with vastly different stories, detectives must determine which one is telling the truth.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When a U.S. Veteran is found shot in the abdomen just minutes from his home, Quinn and Vince must assist detective Barker solve the murder. As the case begins to stall, though, it may take the whole neighborhood to help bring the killer in.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When Quinn and Vince get handed the cold case of an 11-year-old�s murder, they start tracking down old leads to bring new light to the case. As they dig deeper, a former connection to one of the killers may be the lead they need to solve this murder.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: Detroit police are called to the site of an accident, and they find a father of six unresponsive at the wheel, but not from the crash. He’s been shot, and the investigation soon leads police to suspect his former girlfriend has taken deadly revenge

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: In August 2013, Omaha residents are sent into an all-out panic when four victims are tragically found dead days apart. Soon after, Omaha native Nikko Jenkins is arrested, exposing a violent serial killer that a flawed system helped to create.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a responsible 16-year-old girl vanishes, her family fears the worst. Could she have been kidnapped? As police search for her, a story surfaces revealing she kept a deadly secret, and the terrible truth of what happened hits far closer to home.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an up-and-coming rapper goes missing days before Hurricane Harvey makes landfall in Texas, investigators must determine if he was a casualty of love, or the tragic consequence of being involved with the wrong crowd.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Dancing with the Devil
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead in her bathtub under mysterious circumstances. Was it an overdose, an accidental drowning, or something more sinister? It will take a suspect committing another violent crime for the truth to finally be revealed.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Happily Never After
programme.desc: When a beautiful mother of three is beaten and stabbed multiple times in her own home, police are desperate to make sense of the killing. Soon, they uncover a dangerous love triangle, which leads them straight to one woman and her diabolical plan to keep anything from coming between her and her man.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Living a Lie
programme.desc: When a newborn baby girl vanishes from the hospital without a trace, the nation is galvanized into a search to find her. It�s not until 18-years later that an unexpected lead unravels a tale of secrets and shows just how far one woman would go in order to keep the man she loved.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Driven to the Edge
programme.desc: Detroit is shaken to the core after a well-respected community member is gunned down during a robbery. The search for the killer sends investigators into the taboo world of a shocking romance, and at the center is a young woman who fell so hard for her man that she hit rock bottom.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: Police are stunned when two young men are brutally gunned down in their own backyard. A search for the killer sends investigators into the tempestuous world of a desperate and heartbroken lover, and a complex web of lies that conceals the heinous truth.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.desc: When detectives in Lubbock, Texas respond to an early-morning robbery turned homicide, they�re not sure at first where to start looking for the killer. Soon, surveillance video and an anonymous tip will lead them to a dangerous young man, and the girlfriend who was willing to go to any lengths to hide her man�s secret.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A young mom is killed and dumped near a bike path in California, and law enforcement eyes her estranged husband. With no solid proof, however, the case goes cold until a shocking witness comes forward after 13 years to reveal what really happened.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A beloved Detroit trans woman living her truth is found shot to death one December morning. Many suspect a hate crime, and after two witnesses come forward with vastly different stories, detectives must determine which one is telling the truth.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When a U.S. Veteran is found shot in the abdomen just minutes from his home, Quinn and Vince must assist detective Barker solve the murder. As the case begins to stall, though, it may take the whole neighborhood to help bring the killer in.

programme.title: ATL Homicide
programme.desc: When Quinn and Vince get handed the cold case of an 11-year-old�s murder, they start tracking down old leads to bring new light to the case. As they dig deeper, a former connection to one of the killers may be the lead they need to solve this murder.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: Detroit police are called to the site of an accident, and they find a father of six unresponsive at the wheel, but not from the crash. He’s been shot, and the investigation soon leads police to suspect his former girlfriend has taken deadly revenge

programme.title: Sins of the City
programme.sub-title: Sins of the City - Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: In August 2013, Omaha residents are sent into an all-out panic when four victims are tragically found dead days apart. Soon after, Omaha native Nikko Jenkins is arrested, exposing a violent serial killer that a flawed system helped to create.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a responsible 16-year-old girl vanishes, her family fears the worst. Could she have been kidnapped? As police search for her, a story surfaces revealing she kept a deadly secret, and the terrible truth of what happened hits far closer to home.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When an up-and-coming rapper goes missing days before Hurricane Harvey makes landfall in Texas, investigators must determine if he was a casualty of love, or the tragic consequence of being involved with the wrong crowd.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.sub-title: Fatal Attraction - Fireworks and Foul Play
programme.desc: These high school sweethearts were on the verge of having it all, when one of them suddenly disappeared. Police suspect he left by choice until a grisly discovery in the woods uncovers a darker story hiding beneath the surface of his idyllic life.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Amber Reeve/Kumari Fulbright
programme.desc: When book smart, Amber Reeve�s jailhouse romance turns deadly she must decide if her newfound love is worth more than her freedom. Later, beauty queen, Kumari Fulbright�s, dream of becoming a lawyer crumbles when a dangerous love triangle unravels.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Tiffani Jacobs/Jackie Wortham
programme.desc: After falling mysteriously ill, Tiffani Jacobs looks to a man to help her feel normal but her quest for love drives her to do the unthinkable. In Spokane, Washington, Jackie Wortham scorches a path of destruction with a lover who fuels her fire.

programme.title: For My Man
programme.sub-title: For My Man - Risking It All
programme.desc: When a series of brazen, armed robberies strike local businesses in a tranquil community in Wisconsin, detectives find themselves with few clues to help them identify the perpetrators. That is, until police track down real-life Bonnie and Clyde willing to risk it all in the name of love.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When Police Officer Wayne Irby met Denise Miller, they both fell madly in love. But when both Wayne and Denise turn up missing, his fellow officers find out just how mad love can be.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When Kimberly Parker said “I do” to, Elihue Parker, he promised her the world. But their dreams for a bright future are dashed when Elihue turns up missing. As investigators delve deeper, they uncover a twisted ring of greed and deception that will leave them face to face with pure evil.

programme.title: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: When a decorated Navy Commander is found dead in a hotel room, those close to him suspect suicide. But when autopsy results point to homicide, investigators sort through numerous lies to uncover a calculated plot fueled by lust and greed.
